app.name: AgentBoard
app.tagline: AI-assisted Kanban for AI software agencies

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Use your AgentBoard account or start an isolated demo session.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Create a workspace and start from the real API-backed foundation.

demo.description: Creates a real demo session when the database is available.

home.title: AgentBoard
home.description: Plan AI software work, spot delivery risk, and turn rough task notes into clearer implementation briefs from one DB-backed workflow.

proofBoard.title: DB-backed Kanban
proofBoard.description: Create, edit, move, and archive tasks with persisted board state.

proofDashboard.title: Delivery visibility
proofDashboard.description: Track active work, WIP pressure, blocked tasks, due-soon risk, and recent activity.

proofAi.title: Backend-only AI path
proofAi.description: Improve rough tasks through the API while keeping OpenAI keys out of the frontend.

app.title: Workspace overview
app.description: Use the board and dashboard to review real delivery state for this workspace.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: Workspace listing starts in a later vertical slice. This route is intentionally shell-only.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Project listing starts in a later vertical slice. This route is intentionally shell-only.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Settings are limited to shell controls in Phase 3.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The requested route is not part of the current shell.

detail.title: Task detail
detail.saveHint: Changes are saved from this detail sheet.
detail.emptyAssignees: No workspace members are available to assign.
detail.emptyLabels: No labels are available for this workspace.

ai.title: Improve with AI
ai.description: Turn a rough task into a clearer implementation brief with acceptance criteria and subtasks.
ai.titleRequired: This task needs at least a title before AI can improve it.

reviewed.accepted: This AI suggestion has been applied.
reviewed.rejected: This AI suggestion has been rejected.
reviewed.partially_applied: This AI suggestion has been partially applied.
reviewed.pending: This AI suggestion is pending review.

delete.title: Delete task
delete.description: This archives the task and removes it from the board.

move.label: Move to
move.mobileHint: Use this control on mobile instead of dragging.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: A compact DB-backed view of delivery load, WIP pressure, near-term risk, and recent work across the workspace.

wip.title: WIP warnings
wip.description: Columns where active task count exceeds the configured WIP limit.
wip.empty: No WIP limits are currently exceeded.

columns.title: Tasks by status
columns.description: Active task distribution by board column.
columns.empty: No board columns are available yet.

dueSoon.title: Due soon
dueSoon.description: Open tasks due in the next 7 days.
dueSoon.empty: No open tasks are due in the next 7 days.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.description: Latest task events from this workspace.

empty.title: No dashboard data yet
empty.description: Create real board tasks in this workspace and the dashboard will populate from the database.

errors.dbUnavailable: Dashboard metrics require the database. Configure a safe local PostgreSQL DATABASE_URL and retry. Request ID: {{requestId}}.
errors.noWorkspace: Select or create a workspace to view dashboard metrics.

errors.api: The API returned an error. Request ID: {{requestId}}.
errors.aiUnavailable: AI unavailable. Your task was not changed. Request ID: {{requestId}}.
errors.aiRateLimited: AI rate or quota limit reached. Your task was not changed. Request ID: {{requestId}}.
errors.conflict: This account or resource already exists.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Database-backed routes are not available right now. Configure a safe local PostgreSQL DATABASE_URL for auth and demo sessions. Request ID: {{requestId}}.
errors.validation: Check the form fields and try again.

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
